channel.title: Package on Bogdan Penkovsky, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Package on Bogdan Penkovsky, PhD

item.title: Delay Differential Equations
item.description: DDE package is a fast library written in Haskell that I have extracted after my PhD. My work involved a lot dynamical systems described by DDEs. I kept switching between several tools, still I had no fast and flexible library. So here is one now. Here is an example of a DDE model with two delays from a recent publication: -- Equation right-hand side rhs phi0 = DDE.RHS derivative where derivative ((V2 x y), (DDE.

item.title: Hmep
item.description: Multi Expression Programming is a genetic programming variant encoding multiple solutions in the same chromosome. Essentially, a chromosome is a computer program consisting of reusable subprograms. The remarkable thing about MEP algorithms is that they are programs actually writing programs.
